components.name: Docs
components.description: Comprehensive documentation that outlines Cohere's APIs, endpoints, and related developer resources.

components.name: Website
components.description: This represents Cohere's main website, which serves as a primary interface for users and customers to learn about the company's products and services.

components.name: embeddings
components.description: Generates word embeddings for words or phrases.

components.name: command-a-03-2025
components.description: Command A is our most performant model to date, excelling at tool use, agents, retrieval augmented generation (RAG), and multilingual use cases.

components.name: embed-multilingual-light-v3.0
components.description: A smaller, faster version of embed-multilingual-v3.0. Almost as capable, but a lot faster. Supports multiple languages.

components.name: Coral
components.description: Coral is an AI-assistant chatbot, trained to provide helpful and thorough responses to user queries, offering a safe and friendly conversation experience.

components.name: embed-english-v3.0
components.description: A model that allows for text to be classified or turned into embeddings. English only.

components.name: Infrastructure
components.description: It provides real-time information on the health and performance of Cohere's API infrastructure, indicating whether the services are functioning optimally or experiencing any disruptions

components.name: Playground
components.description: The Playground is an interactive testing environment for users to experiment with Cohere's API, observe response generation, and explore the capabilities of the underlying language model.

components.name: embed-english-light-v3.0
components.description: A smaller, faster version of embed-english-v3.0. Almost as capable, but a lot faster. English only.

components.name: rerank-english-v3.0
components.description: Rerank endpoint enables you to significantly improve search quality by augmenting traditional key-word based search systems with a semantic-based reranking system which can contextualize the meaning of a user's query beyond keyword relevance.

components.name: command-r7b
components.description: The smallest model in our R series delivers top-tier speed, efficiency, and quality to build powerful AI applications on commodity GPUs and edge devices.

components.name: rerank-multilingual-v3.0
components.description: Rerank endpoint enables you to significantly improve search quality by augmenting traditional key-word based search systems with a semantic-based reranking system which can contextualize the meaning of a user's query beyond keyword relevance.  In over 100 languages.

components.name: rerank-english-v2.0
components.description: Rerank will return a sorted list of documents based on the semantic similarity between the query and documents.

components.name: rerank-v3.5
components.description: Rerank 3.5 delivers improved reasoning and multilingual capabilities to search complex enterprise data with greater accuracy.

components.name: rerank-multilingual-v2.0
components.description: Rerank will return a sorted list of documents based on the semantic similarity between the query and documents in over 100 languages.

components.name: embed-multilingual-v3.0
components.description: Provides multilingual classification and embedding support.
